tool-bundle.procedures:
<procedure-definition id="FSS-TS-VAL-SCH" name="Validate Dates" category="Schedule" javasource-file="SessionEndDateChecker.java" input-file="ValidateDatesInput.xml" weight="1" description="
What this tool does
This procedure includes both start and end dates for calendars and schedule terms to review, by school.
A school is validated if it has an active schedule record. If no active schedule is found, this is output.
End dates include terms only at the end of a series, e.g. S2, T3, Q4.
Start dates include terms only at the beginning of a series, e.g. S1, T1, Q1
FY is always included
How to read the output of the tool
The tool informs you when the tool has begun and ended, ensuring you know that all schools were validated.
If run with both dates returned, a school is run twice with end date results first, then start date.
Disclaimer
This tool is provided by Technical Support as-is, with no support or guarantee of its longevity. Modifications to this tool in any regard must be completed by a developer through a service request." schedulable="false" disable-autokill="false"/>
